Elementos/text.name: text
Elementos/text.description: The<text>SVGelement draws a graphics element consisting of text. It's possible to apply a gradient, pattern, clipping path, mask, or filter to<text>, like any other SVG graphics element.

info.excerpt: The<text>SVGelement draws a graphics element consisting of text. It's possible to apply a gradient, pattern, clipping path, mask, or filter to<text>, like any other SVG graphics element.

Elementos/textPath.name: textPath
Elementos/textPath.description:
The<textPath>SVGelement is used to render text along the shape of a<path>element.
The text must be enclosed in the<textPath>element and itshrefattribute is used to reference the desired<path>.

info.excerpt:
The<textPath>SVGelement is used to render text along the shape of a<path>element.
The text must be enclosed in the<textPath>element and itshrefattribute is used to reference the desired<path>.

Elementos/title.name: title
Elementos/title.description: The<title>SVGelement provides an accessible, short-text description of any SVGcontainer elementorgraphics element.

info.excerpt: The<title>SVGelement provides an accessible, short-text description of any SVGcontainer elementorgraphics element.

Elementos/tspan.name: tspan
Elementos/tspan.description: The<tspan>SVGelement defines a subtext within a<text>element or another<tspan>element. It allows for adjustment of the style and/or position of that subtext as needed.

info.excerpt: The<tspan>SVGelement defines a subtext within a<text>element or another<tspan>element. It allows for adjustment of the style and/or position of that subtext as needed.
